platform_decisions.content: Plugin system separates installation (global) from enablement (per-project) via installed_plugins.json vs settings.json
Bundled skills compiled into binary without plugin UI toggle; built-in plugins have UI control
MCP skill builder registry breaks circular dependency via function references at init time
Coordinator mode gated by Bun feature flag + runtime env var, with custom system prompt
Coordinator defines internal worker tools (orchestration only) vs worker tools (execution only)
Coordinator scratchpad as durable cross-worker filesystem (feature-gated)
Ink/React rendering with custom Yoga layout engine (native TS, not WASM)
Ink optimizer compares frames and emits only diffs to terminal
Terminal capabilities detected once at startup (extended keys, kitty/iterm protocol, mouse)
Component library: 146 files of specialized widgets composing Ink primitives, no external UI framework
Keybinding system parses chord sequences with normalized modifier aliases
Model selection priority: session override > CLI flag > env var > settings > default
Model capabilities cached to disk, loaded synchronously; 3P providers use hardcoded defaults
Four API providers: FirstParty, Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry via environment variables
Cost tracking in memory during session, persisted to settings only at session boundaries
Pure-TS bash parser with 50ms timeout and 50k-node budget to prevent DoS
Bash spec registry with Fig autocomplete for command validation and completion
Computer use tooling gated by GrowthBook + subscription tier
Bridge API provides OAuth-authenticated HTTP access to claude.ai for remote sessions
Bridge session state machine: Create then Poll then Execute then Report then Await
Trusted device token injection for elevated security tier
Output styles as Markdown prompt templates with keep-coding-instructions flag
Hooks config in settings.json under hooks.* (sync) and hooksAsync.* (async) keys
Async hook registry with timeout management and progress intervals
Post-sampling hooks as internal extensibility (not user-visible, failures dont block)
Permission layering: mode then rules then hooks then tool validation then denial tracking
Sandbox escape prevention: O_NOFOLLOW + O_EXCL flags, nonce paths, 0o600 permissions
Cost accounting as observability: per-model token counts, duration, USD with unknown model flagging
Context window negotiation: model downgrade on overflow, budget shortfall reporting
Fast mode disables prompt caching and uses faster model for low-latency queries
Feature flags via Bun bundle for compile-time dead code elimination
System prompt composition as layered sources: hardcoded + git + coordinator + user + system context
User context (static per session) vs system context (mutable, memoized) split
QueryEngine as multi-turn orchestrator: context then prompt then API then tools then loop
ToolUseContext passed to every tool as immutable snapshot; mutations via return values only
Plugin dependency resolution via topological sort with cycle detection
Plugin version pinning via marketplace SHA field; unpinned tracks branch head
Orphaned plugin filter detects stale directories and removes them lazily at startup
Plugin policy engine enforces marketplace restrictions, forbidden plugins, force-enable rules
MCP server lifecycle: separate process with auto-reconnect on crash, non-blocking failure
Hook event dispatch: sync hooks block sequentially (any can stop chain), async hooks fire in parallel
Prompt elicitation protocol: PromptRequest/PromptResponse JSON with ID-based correlation
Memory system as lazily injected context loaded into system prompt on demand
Agent system: spawnable workers with own models/tools, max recursion depth, task notification reporting
Managed plugins (org policy, read-only) vs user plugins (toggleable) distinguished by source field
LSP integration for plugin development with language features for .claude files
Plugin marketplace polling at startup with cache throttling and offline fallback
Marketplace entry structure: name, version, deps, repo, SHA, compat tags with schema validation
Plugin telemetry: invocation events with plugin/skill name, tokens, duration (opt-in)
React component rendering lifecycle: reconciler diffs tree, Renderer diffs screen cells
Yoga layout as single-pass CSS Flexbox engine with cached measurements per frame
